name_cn:
Top-tier replica, size changed chip
M12965 Off-White M12934 Black
This Speedy Cargo bag is from the LV Vibe series, reimagining a 1930s classic design with a bold touch. The glossy lambskin body is accented with a Monogram address plate, paying tribute to the brand's long history of trunk making. Ample space easily holds daily essentials, and a detachable leather shoulder strap allows for multiple carrying styles.
17 x 12 x 28 cm
(H x W x L)
Lambskin
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Address plate
Utility pocket
Metallic studs
Fits 6.7-inch smartphone, Sarah long wallet, sunglasses, headphones, lipstick, and keys
Strap: Detachable, non-adjustable
Strap half-length: 43.0 cm
Handles: Double handles
